category_sources: source_facts.description says libwebm is for the WebM container.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides libwebm and source_facts.repo is the official WebM Project libwebm repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official WebM Project site and has an official docs section; source_facts.repo provides the official repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies WebM container support; source_facts.executables lists WebM/Matroska sample tools.
